turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, may I speak with [CONSUMER_NAME]?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Speaking. Who's this?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. [CONSUMER_NAME]. This is [AGENT_NAME] calling from [AGENCY_NAME]. Before we continue, can you verify the last four digits of your Social Security number for me?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Uh, sure. It's [SSN_LAST4].

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for verifying that. I am a debt collector calling to collect a det — debt. Any information obtained during this call will be used for that purpose. This call may be monitored or recorded for quality assurance. Do I have your permission to record?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Yeah, I guess that's fine.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. I'm calling regarding an account with [CREDITOR_NAME]. The current balance is [DEBT_AMOUNT]. A validation notice with the full account details, the name of the creditor, and your right to dispute this debt within thirty days was mailed to your address on file at [STREET_ADDRESS] on [VALIDATION_DATE]. Did you receive that notice?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Not yet. I actually just moved last month, so mail might still be going to the old place.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand. I can update your mailing address in our system. What is your current address?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: It's [STREET_ADDRESS].

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. I've noted that — [STREET_ADDRESS]. The validation notice will be re-sent there within two business days. Now, the purpose of today's call is to discuss payment options. We can set up a monthly payment plan, or if it works better for you, we can explore a settlement for less than the full balance. What would you prefer?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I don't know. I can probably do like two hundred a month or something.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Two hundred dollars per month would clear this balance in approximately seven months. I can set that up as an automatic debit on the fifteenth of each month, starting [PAYMENT_DATE]. Would you like me to proceed with that?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Yeah, that sounds okay.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great. I'll need either a checking account or a debit card for the auto-debit. Which do you have available?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Checking account.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please provide the routing number and account number when you're ready.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: The routing is [ROUTING_NUMBER]. The account is [ACCOUNT_NUMBER].

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me repeat that back. Routing number [ROUTING_NUMBER]. Account number [ACCOUNT_NUMBER]. Is that correct?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Yeah, that's right.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. The first payment of two hundred dollars will be drafted on [PAYMENT_DATE]. You'll receive a confirmation letter at your updated address within five business days. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: No, that's it. Thanks for working with me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for your time today, Mr. [CONSUMER_NAME]. Have a good afternoon.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: You too. Bye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Goodbye.
